title: Mossel Bay Municipality secures a win at Ameu Awards
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality was the winner of the top-performing project award in the category for metro or municipal utilities at the Association of Municipal Electricity Utilities (Ameu) 2025 Awards on Tuesday 7 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality was the winner of the top-performing project award in the category for metro or municipal utilities at the Association of Municipal Electricity Utilities (Ameu) 2025 Awards on Tuesday 7 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The award was for the municipality’s 2MVA solar PV system with battery energy storage (Bess) at the Hartenbos Regional Wastewater Treatment Works, an infrastructure project valued at over R100m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the municipality, this hybrid solar installation is designed to safeguard critical wastewater operations against stage 6 load-shedding and ensure uninterrupted service delivery, even in the event of a national blackout.","html":"According to the municipality, this hybrid solar installation is designed to safeguard critical wastewater operations against stage 6 load-shedding and ensure uninterrupted service delivery, even in the event of a national blackout."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Excess energy generated is exported to the municipal grid, contributing to long-term cost savings and environmental sustainability.","html":"Excess energy generated is exported to the municipal grid, contributing to long-term cost savings and environmental sustainability."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“We are honoured to be recognised for a solution that not only protects vital infrastructure, but also empowers our community,” said Municipal Manager Colin Puren."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The project was created in partnership with Element Eden Consulting Engineers and Solareff, and came as a result of the peak load-shedding in 2022 and 2023.","html":"The project was created in partnership with Element Eden Consulting Engineers and Solareff, and came as a result of the peak load-shedding in 2022 and 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The installation spans 3.5ha and includes 4 400 solar panels, a 3.2MVA inverter station, and a 4 500kWh battery energy storage system.","html":"The installation spans 3.5ha and includes 4 400 solar panels, a 3.2MVA inverter station, and a 4 500kWh battery energy storage system."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality’s 2MVA solar PV system with battery energy storage at the Hartenbos Regional Wastewater Treatment Works. Photo: Mossel Bay Municipality","html":"The municipality’s 2MVA solar PV system with battery energy storage at the Hartenbos Regional Wastewater Treatment Works. Photo: Mossel Bay Municipality"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The municipality added that all necessary environmental approvals were obtained, and that the environmental impact was minimal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Future expansion of the project is already planned, with environmental authorisation secured for a solar panel area double the current size, allowing for potential growth to 5MVA capacity, says the municipality.","html":"Future expansion of the project is already planned, with environmental authorisation secured for a solar panel area double the current size, allowing for potential growth to 5MVA capacity, says the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Ameu is a South African body for municipal electricity utilities and their affiliate members, recognising excellence in the electricity sector.","html":"The Ameu is a South African body for municipal electricity utilities and their affiliate members, recognising excellence in the electricity sector."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These awards are presented annually to highlight achievements, innovation and contributions within the industry.","html":"These awards are presented annually to highlight achievements, innovation and contributions within the industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
